strengths: Extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, React, and Node.js across multiple production systems
Proven ability to own and ship complex systems from database to UI, including AI-agent and automation infrastructure
Strong open-source contributions and technical communication skills demonstrated through workshops and public projects
concerns: Job titles (e.g., Staff Software Engineer) suggest senior-level experience, potentially misaligned with entry-level role expectations
Limited explicit mention of PostgreSQL, Nest.js, or REST API design — key required skills — in resume content
German language proficiency is only basic, while high on-site presence in Berlin is required
response.justification: The candidate brings deep, diverse fullstack expertise with TypeScript and modern web technologies, along with strong architectural and open-source practices that exceed junior expectations — but his senior-level titles, lack of confirmed PostgreSQL/Nest.js experience, and limited German proficiency raise questions about role fit and on-site collaboration readiness.
